arts.ttl: Papers: Arsenal to reject Kolo Muani and Coman as neither 'good value'
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Confident Kinsky earns trust of his Spurs teammates … and Postecoglou
arts.sum: The 21-year-old has kept two clean sheets in a row Spurs manager calls abuse at Tamworth ‘detestable’ Antonin Kinsky has bred confidence in his new Tottenham teammates and liberated them, according to the manager, Ange Postecoglou, who is ready to pitch him into another huge challenge on Wednesday night – the north London derby at Arsenal. It has been a whirlwind period for the 21-year-old goalkeeper since his arrival from Slavia Prague on the Sunday before last; the £12.5m fee made it one of the most expensive transfers from the Czech league. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd knock out Arsenal with 'five perfect penalties'
arts.sum: Watch the full penalty shootout as Manchester United score "five perfect penalties" to knock out Arsenal of the FA Cup and progress to the fourth round.

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive £18.6m transfer boost after major Mikel Arteta hint and January deal confirmed
arts.sum: Despite an injury to Bukayo Saka, the Gunners looked unlikely to make any new signings in the winter window but two further attacking blows could change that. Following that injury blow, Arteta was asked about the January transfer window and if plans had been altered as a result.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms 'very clear ideas' as Arsenal chase striker signing
arts.sum: Gunners on the hunt for reinforcements amid multiple injury blows

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta backs Raheem Sterling to step up in Tottenham derby clash
arts.sum: Chelsea loanee in line to start the north London derby after timely return from injury

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou backs Dominic Solanke to hit new level with transfer 'help'
arts.sum: Postecoglou is wary of overloading Solanke as Spurs target a new forward this month

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou sheds new light on true size of Antonin Kinsky impact
arts.sum: New goalkeeper backed to ‘embrace the challenge’ of dealing with Arsenal set-pieces in north London derby

arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky already making Tottenham history as Ange Postecoglou hails impact
arts.sum: Antonin Kinsky arrived at Tottenham in a £12.5m move from Slavia Prague last week and has kept two clean sheets, the first goalkeeper at the club to do that in a century

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta discloses Jack Wilshere's key role in Arsenal's approach to North London Derby
arts.sum: Jack Wilshere played a key role in forming Mikel Arteta's attitude to North London derbies, one which he has now passed to his players as they prepare to face Tottenham on Wednesday
